name: Meta Glasses
description: Pair Meta Ray-Ban (Gen 2) smart glasses with your Crow BYOAI. The Crow Android app uses Meta's official Wearables Device Access Toolkit to give the glasses a voice turn powered by your configured STT + AI + TTS profiles.
author: Crow
notes: Requires Crow Android app 1.4.0+ with the Meta Wearables DAT integration compiled in. The gateway-side code runs anywhere; glasses audio/camera capture happens on the paired Android phone. STT and TTS are taken from the default stt_profile / tts_profile (platform-wide settings). Chat routes through the default ai_profile.
